json_data.title: Preparation for the Major
json_data.description: Select one intermediate sequence in a Southeast Asian language offered by the department (e.g., courses listed or equivalent):

options.title: Intermediate Sequence in One Southeast Asian Language
courses: FILIPNO 6 - Intermediate Filipino
INDO 6 - Intermediate Indonesian
THAI 6 - Intermediate Thai
VIETMSE 6 - Intermediate Vietnamese

options.title: Southeast Asian Studies 50
courses: SEASIAN 50 - Southeast Asian Societies and Cultures

courses: ASIAN 30 - Languages and Cultures of Asia
SEASIAN M60 - Religious Traditions in Southeast Asia
SEASIAN 70 - Modern Southeast Asian Literature
VIETMSE 40 - War in Vietnamese Popular Culture
